PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Trevor Zink appeared via zoom for Alan Farnham (petitioner).
Phil Tukia appeared via court call for Alungamalie Unga (objector).

The Court denies a second continuance request by Objector deeming any objections waived under CRC 7.801.

The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 02, 2022 is admitted to probate. Alan Farnham is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $31,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for October 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.. Michael Kasolas is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Yang. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Continued To Sep-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Trevor Zink appearing via zoom for Alan Farnham (petitioner).
Phil Tukia appearing via CourtCall for Alungamalie Unga (objector).

Mr. Tukia client is objecting to the petition of appointment of Alan Farnham as executor. Petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary is continued to September 05, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-11-2023 Continued To Aug-08-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
